articles.title: Recent homes sales in Greater Boston (July 8)
articles.description:
ABINGTON 9 Karen Lane. One-family raised ranch, built in 1973, 1,652 square feet, 6 rooms, 3 bedrooms, 2 baths, on 20,019-square-foot lot. $750,000 77 Clapp St. One-family ranch, built in 1952, 1,012 square feet, 6 rooms, 3 bedrooms, 1 bath, on 6,914-square-foot lot. $525,000 ACTON 44 Wood Lane. One-family Colonial, built in 2009, 2,594 square […]

The post Recent homes sales in Greater Boston (July 8) appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Recent home sales in Greater Boston highlight diverse properties and prices.
Abington's 9 Karen Lane sold for $750,000; 77 Clapp St. for $525,000.
Rising home prices may affect affordability for Boston residents seeking housing.
